home.loginErrorHint: Common causes: (1) Under Discord → OAuth2 → Redirects, add exactly the URL below (same application as Client ID & Secret). (2) On Vercel → Environment Variables for Production: NEXTAUTH_URL = site base URL with no trailing slash (e.g. https://raidflow.vercel.app). (3) NEXTAUTH_SECRET and DISCORD_CLIENT_ID / DISCORD_CLIENT_SECRET set for Production. (4) "OAuthCallback" often means redirect URI mismatch, wrong client secret, or Discord app mismatch vs Vercel.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.guildsEmpty: No guilds. Set up the bot on a Discord server.
dashboard.noRaiderRights: You do not have Raider rights in this guild (yet)
dashboard.noCharacters: No characters yet. Create a character in your profile first.
dashboard.mySignupsEmpty: You are not signed up for any raids in this period.
dashboard.noteHint: The note is visible in the raid view.

raidDetail.modeQueryHint: URL query: mode or modus = view | edit | signup (German aliases: anzeigen, bearbeiten, anmelden). Default: view.
raidDetail.forbiddenEdit: You are not allowed to edit this raid.
raidDetail.forbiddenSignupClosed: Signup is not available (status or deadline).
raidDetail.forbiddenAccess: You do not have access to this raid.
raidDetail.forbiddenGuild: You are not a member of this guild in RaidFlow.
raidDetail.signupListHidden: The full list is only visible to raid leaders.
raidDetail.editPlaceholder: Raid settings will be editable here in a future version.
raidDetail.raidEditClosed: Editing is only available while the raid is open.
raidDetail.withdrawReasonHint: You are on the confirmed roster. Please briefly explain why you are withdrawing (for the raid leaders).
raidDetail.signupReserveOnlyPhase: After the signup deadline you can only sign up as reserve.
raidDetail.signupAllowReserve: If full: sign up as reserve
raidDetail.discordStatusHint: Your status in Discord: the thread shows the same overview; your personal signup is here under Sign up.
raidDetail.lateNoteRequired: A short note is required when "I will be late" is checked.
raidDetail.signupNoCharacters: No characters in this guild. Add a character first.
raidDetail.deleteRaidConfirm: Permanently delete this raid? This cannot be undone.
raidDetail.signupSpecChoice: Which spec are you signing up with?
raidDetail.signupPickSpec: Choose main or off spec (buttons above).
raidDetail.noteRequiredForState: A short note is required for tentative/reserve or late arrival.
raidDetail.forbidReserveConflictsWithType: With “Forbid reserve” enabled, you cannot sign up as reserve.

raidRosterPlanner.draftHint: Draft: changes are only saved when you click “Save”.
raidRosterPlanner.announceConfirm: Announce this raid now? Players will be set as planned; after that only reserve signups are possible.
raidRosterPlanner.announceSaveManualFirst: Please save first: there are unsaved manual signups.
raidRosterPlanner.rosterEmpty: Nobody placed yet — drag from signups.
raidRosterPlanner.reserveEmpty: No bench yet — drag characters here.
raidRosterPlanner.reserveFilteredEmpty: No bench entries match the current filters.
raidRosterPlanner.poolEmpty: All signups are placed on the left.
raidRosterPlanner.poolFilteredEmpty: No signups match the current filters.
raidRosterPlanner.addHint: Pick exactly one character or cancel.
raidRosterPlanner.forbiddenPlan: Only raid leaders can use the planner.
raidRosterPlanner.saveErrorDiscordMultiGroup: The same Discord account may only be placed in one group.
raidRosterPlanner.leaderPlanNotesHint: Use the buttons for formatting; saved to the raid when you click Save.

raidEdit.terminHint: Changing start/end clears all signups only after you confirm.
raidEdit.resetSignupsWarning: The schedule changes. All current signups will be removed. Continue?
raidEdit.lockConfirm: Lock this raid? Status becomes locked; if the roster was leader-only, it becomes visible to everyone.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.themeDescription: Display mode is toggled in the topbar (light/dark); stored in profile and cookie.
profile.weekFocusHint: This setting has no effect; it only serves as a guide when planning raids.
profile.charactersDescription: Characters with name, guild, spec and off-spec.
profile.autoAddDescription: Enter server and character name. RaidFlow validates the character via the Battle.net API and creates the entry automatically.
profile.characterAddBnetHint: Pick your realm from the list, enter the character name, then run “BNet Sync”. After that, choose class (prefilled from Battle.net when recognized) and main spec manually, then off-spec and save.
profile.bnetExactSpellingHint: Use the exact spelling as in WoW—including special characters and capitalization.
profile.bnetPendingSaveHint: Battle.net data will be linked when you save.
profile.bnetSyncRequiredBeforeSave: A successful Battle.net sync is required before you can save. Check name and realm, then run “BNet Sync”. If you change the name, sync again until it matches Battle.net exactly.
profile.bnetLevelTooLowFun: Your hero is still collecting boar tusks? Battle.net says you’re under level {min}. We need at least {min} here—grab a little more XP and come back when the raid notices you!
profile.bnetMainSpecManualHint: Class may be taken from Battle.net; you set the main spec here.
profile.bnetResyncRequiredAfterNameChange: After changing the character name, run “BNet Sync” again before saving.
profile.noRaidFlowGuildMembership: You’re not on any RaidFlow Discord server—saving without a guild is allowed in that case.
profile.lootTableDescription: Loot received per guild and dungeon.
profile.realmFilterHint: {count} realms in the list (manual entry is also possible).
profile.realmsLoadFailed: Could not load the realm list.
profile.realmsLoadUnauthorized: Please sign in again to load the realm list.
profile.realmNoMatches: No matching realms. Keep typing or check spelling.
profile.realmPickFromList: Pick an entry from the list (required for a unique API lookup).
profile.realmListEmpty: No realms in the database. Run `npm run db:sync:wowrealms` on the server or seed the preview DB.

guildManagement.title: Guild Management
guildManagement.forbidden: You do not have permission for guild management. Only RaidFlow Guild Masters can access this page.
guildManagement.raidGroupsDescription: Create, edit or delete raid groups. The Discord role "Raidflowgroup-(Name)" will be created.
guildManagement.membersDescription: Guild members and their raid group assignment.
guildManagement.readChannelsDescription: Channels where the bot may create raid threads.
guildManagement.allowedChannelsDescription: Channels where the bot may create raid threads. When creating a raid, one of these can be selected.
guildManagement.noChannelsFetched: No channels loaded yet. Click "Load channels from Discord".
guildManagement.characterAllowedInGroup: Allowed in raid group (for raid filters)
guildManagement.characterAllowedErrorLast: At least one character per user must remain allowed in the raid group.
guildManagement.unsavedChangesLeaveConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Discard changes and leave the page?
guildManagement.battlenetSectionDescription: Link your WoW guild by realm and guild name. “BNet Connect” checks Battle.net; after a successful lookup you can save the link.
guildManagement.battlenetConnectHint: Looks up the guild in the Battle.net index; if there are several hits, pick one.
guildManagement.battlenetRealmHint: Same list as on your profile (database). Type to filter.
guildManagement.battlenetSelectResultFirst: Select a guild from the list.
guildManagement.battlenetClearConfirm: Remove the Battle.net link for this guild?

raidPlanner.title: New raid
raidPlanner.forbidden: Only RaidFlow raid leaders or guild masters can create a new raid.
raidPlanner.noDungeons: No raid dungeons in the database. Check seed data.
raidPlanner.step2ScheduleHint: Pick the raid window on the timeline and review the pool. Adjust raid time and signup deadline in step 1.
raidPlanner.step2FromTerminHint: Timeline: raid window start and end. Apply closes this view; Cancel discards changes since opening.
raidPlanner.minSpecs: Minimum count (class + spec, or class only)
raidPlanner.minSpecLegacyHint: Legacy entry: {key}. Change class or spec to replace it.
raidPlanner.raidDateHint: Set start time here; use “Availability” for the timeline to fine-tune the raid window.
raidPlanner.validationBasics: Please choose a dungeon, enter a raid name, and set the raid time and signup deadline.
raidPlanner.validationSignupBeforeRaid: Signup must close before the raid starts.
raidPlanner.timelineClickHint: First click: start time. Second click: end time. Click again to start a new range.
raidPlanner.heatmapLegendGreen: Green: role minimums and all spec/class minimum rows met.
raidPlanner.heatmapLegendOrange: Orange: roles ok, spec/class requirements met at ≥80% but not fully.
raidPlanner.heatmapLegendRed: Red: roles ok, spec/class requirements below 80% met.
raidPlanner.liveMinOk: Minimum requirements are met for the selected slot (filtered pool).
raidPlanner.liveMinShort: Minimum requirements are not yet met for the selected slot (filtered pool).

admin.title: Admin
admin.forbidden: You do not have permission for the admin area. Only application admins can access this page.
admin.dbUnavailable: The database is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later or check your Vercel/Supabase environment (DATABASE_URL).
admin.guildsSectionDescription: Delete guilds (including associated raids, signups, role data).
admin.deleteGuildConfirm: Permanently delete guild "{name}" and all associated data?
admin.whitelistBlacklistDescription: Whitelist: Only allowed servers use RaidFlow. Blacklist: Exclude specific servers. Only one option active.
admin.serverWhitelist: Allowed server IDs (Discord guild ID, one per line)
admin.serverBlacklist: Excluded server IDs (Discord guild ID, one per line)
admin.adminsSectionDescription: Add or remove admins (by Discord ID). Owner cannot be removed.
admin.discordBotInviteDescription: When inactive, the Discord bot invite functions are grayed out and non-functional.
admin.maintenanceDescription: When maintenance mode is active, users see only the message below after login. Admins/Owners have full access. The text is also shown on the landing page. When maintenance mode is off, the text appears as a status message below the topbar and on the landing page.

ownerDiagnostics.title: System diagnostics
ownerDiagnostics.subtitle: Environment checks, masked secrets, and connectivity — for troubleshooting only. Do not share screenshots publicly.
ownerDiagnostics.oauthMemberHintBody: If the bot cannot read guild members (missing Server Members Intent), the app falls back to your Discord login scope guilds.members.read. After a scope change, sign out and sign in with Discord once.
ownerDiagnostics.footerHint: Secrets are never shown in full; only length and a short masked preview. Fix issues using Vercel/hosting env and Discord Developer Portal.
